member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Jobs.ClearPlayerTamerRefCountJob
member.summary: This job is used to clear tamers for a specific player, typically when they leave the game or the room.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Jobs.ClearPlayerTamerRefCountJob.#ctor(ReadyM.Api.Idents.PlayerId)
member.summary: This job is used to clear tamers for a specific player, typically when they leave the game or the room.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.CreateLocalMainCharacterEntitySystem
member.summary: Creates the MainCharacterEntity corresponding to the locally controlled pawn

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.CreateLocalMainCharacterEntitySystem.#ctor(ReadyM.Relay.Client.State.ClientState,WukongMp.Api.State.WukongPlayerState,WukongMp.Api.WukongEventBus,ReadyM.Api.Multiplayer.Mapping.Data.IComponentFieldMappingRegistry,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Creates the MainCharacterEntity corresponding to the locally controlled pawn

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.DespawnOtherMainCharactersSystem
member.summary: Despawns the pawns corresponding to MainCharacterEntities for other players. Doesn't affect the main players' MainCharacterEntity.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.MainCharacters.SpawnOtherMainCharactersSystem
member.summary: Spawns pawns for the MainCharacterEntities corresponding to other players. Doesn't affect the MainCharacterEntity or pawn of the local player.
Spawns pawns for the MainCharacterEntities corresponding to other players. Doesn't affect the MainCharacterEntity or pawn of the local player.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.Tamers.SpawnTamersSystem
member.summary: Spawns pawns for monsters that do not correspond to any current scene pawn. Tamers have local state that indicates whether they require spawning.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.ECS.Systems.Tamers.SpawnTamersSystem.#ctor(ReadyM.Relay.Client.State.ClientState,WukongMp.Api.GameplayEventRouter,WukongMp.Api.Configuration.GameplayConfiguration)
member.summary: Spawns pawns for monsters that do not correspond to any current scene pawn. Tamers have local state that indicates whether they require spawning.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.FreeCamera.FreeCameraManager.UpdatePawnPositionToCamera
member.summary: Updates the pawn's position to align with the camera's current location in order to load level where the camera is.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.Https.BouncyCastleHttpsClient.PutBytesAsync(System.Uri,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a PUT request to upload raw byte data, suitable for Azure Blob Storage with a SAS URL.
member.param: The request URL, including SAS token if applicable.
The raw file content to upload.
member.returns: The HTTP status code of the response.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Https.FileInfo.Name
member.summary: The name of the file.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Https.FileInfo.Content
member.summary: The binary content of the file.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi
member.summary: API for managing world and player saves in Wukong Multiplayer.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.UploadWorldSaveAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads the world save file to the server. This operation always overwrites the existing world save file on the server, if any. At this point, the server is expected to keep only the most recent world save file for all players.
member.param: The content of the world save file to upload.
Cancellation token to cancel the upload operation.
member.returns: if the save was uploaded successfully, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.DownloadWorldSaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the world save file from the server.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the download operation.
member.returns: The content of the world save file if the download was successful, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.UploadPlayerSaveAsync(System.Byte[],System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads the player's save file to the server. This operation always overwrites the existing save file on the server, if any. At this point, the server is expected to keep only the most recent save file for each player.
member.param: The content of the save file to upload.
Cancellation token to cancel the upload operation.
member.returns: if the save was uploaded successfully, otherwise.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.IWukongSaveApi.DownloadPlayerSaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the player's save file from the server. This operation is expected to return the most recent save file for the player, if any.
member.param: Cancellation token to cancel the download operation.
member.returns: The content of the player's save file if the download was successful, otherwise.

members.member: Null when the summoner is a BGU_QuestActor or other unmapped actor

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.AntiStallWarning
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Engage!.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.BlueTeam
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Team Blue.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.BotName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bot.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Down.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.CameraUpDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Up.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ENTER - Type/Send | K - Hide/Show Chat.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ChatHelperNoSendDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to K - Hide/Show Event Log.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cheats disabled.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ENTER - Type | F1 - Hide/Show.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Connected
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Players in zone.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ConnectionRejectedByServer
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Connection rejected by server.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} set spirit cooldown to {1} s.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Disconnected.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.ExecutionError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Execution error: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.HintCommandsUse
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press F1 to use commands.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} disabled infinite mana.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InfManaEnabled

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid argument format: {0}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid argument at index {0}. Expected {1}, got {2}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid command: {0}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.InvalidCommandFormat

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press J to be not ready.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press J to be ready.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.PressToCancelMatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press I to cancel match.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press I to play with bots.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Press L to switch team.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.RedTeam

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.RoundCount
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Round {0} of {1}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Severe packet loss detected!.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.SoftlockDetected
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Softlock. Use /softlock command to respawn.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.Spectators
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Spectators.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.StallingMessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Stalling - losing HP.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too few arguments: min {0}, actual {1}.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Too many arguments: max {0}, actual {1}.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.TournamentDraw
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Draw.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.TournamentEndedWinner

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForEnd
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for the match to end.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForOtherPlayers
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for other players.

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.WaitForOtherPlayersCount
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Wait for other players ({0}/{1}).

member.name: P:WukongMp.Api.Resources.BuiltinTexts.YouAreReady
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to You are ready.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase
member.summary: Base class for UI widgets defined in .pak files.
member.param: The path to the widget, relative to the "Content/UI" folder in the .pak files. For example, for a widget located at "Content/UI/MyWidget.uasset", the path would be "MyWidget".

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base class for UI widgets defined in .pak files.
member.param: The path to the widget, relative to the "Content/UI" folder in the .pak files. For example, for a widget located at "Content/UI/MyWidget.uasset", the path would be "MyWidget".

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the widget by trying to find it first, and if it doesn't exist, spawns a new one.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.SetVisibility(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Set the visibility of the widget. This requires the widget to be initialized first, otherwise it will do nothing.
member.param: Whether the widget should be visible or not.

member.name: M:WukongMp.Api.UI.GameWidgetBase.Deinitialize
member.summary: Removes the widget from the viewport and sets the reference to null.

member.name: T:WukongMp.Api.WukongEventBus
member.summary: Exposes events related to level transitions, such as loading, playing, and exiting levels. This allows mods to hook into these events and perform actions at the appropriate times during the level lifecycle.
